scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix desktop install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -n server,client,desktop -c blue,green,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:1000 && npm --prefix desktop run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
